entries.proof: `cargo check -p jeryu && cargo test -p jeryu agent_surface`
entries.invariants: Generated routing index is derived from repo truth; audit fails on missing hard surfaces and outdated generated output.
Bootstrap remains non-interactive and records generated credentials only in local env files.
Each trust namespace has its own BuildKit instance to prevent cache poisoning; namespace is injected into all generated configs; never share builder state across namespaces
LRU GC every 30 min; active-manager caches never collected; CAS atomic store

entries.owner: Cache Decision Brain (Trust + Taint + Epoch Integration)
entries.invariants: Cache hits require matching trust tier; tainted objects never produce hits; epoch mismatch forces miss; all three checks must pass before a hit is returned
Proxy forwards to sccache; authentication failures are logged and traffic is dropped, not forwarded; proxy lifecycle is tied to the executor session
All external agent payloads deserialize through AgentIntent or AgentActionRequest
Capsules stay structured, redacted, and sufficient to reproduce a failed job.

entries.owner: Cargo cache layout and local agent helpers
entries.invariants: Cache keys are deterministic; target dirs stay scoped by repo/project, toolchain, and host triple; active leases are never collected.
All types are pub(crate); main.rs is the only consumer
These wrappers never terminate the process directly; `main` owns final exit handling.
Install commands stay user-space by default and avoid shell scripts.
Remote commands orchestrate SSH and remote bootstrap from Rust only.
Repo-local maintenance paths stay in Rust and avoid shell helpers.

entries.owner: Agent Decision Engine (Risk Gates, Supersedence, Impact Classification)
entries.invariants: All agent outcomes flow through evaluate_risk_gate; supersedence and impact are typed enums, never raw strings; RiskGateDecision must be checked before any merge or promotion
All logic dispatches to domain modules; no business logic here
Docker calls preserve container ownership labels and surface runtime errors to callers.
5-min recon cycle; Docker crash recovery via event stream; supersedence on newer SHA
Epoch bumps are recorded with author_job_id and reason; is_valid fails closed (returns false) on lookup failure; epochs are per-scope and never shared across scopes
Quarantine-on-tripwire; capsule capture on failure; CAS exact-hit skip
